sourcesContent:
import AudiotrackIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Audiotrack';
import CopyrightIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Copyright';
import InstagramIcon from '@mui/icons-material/Instagram';
import YouTubeIcon from '@mui/icons-material/YouTube';
import { Box, Container, Divider, Grid, IconButton, Typography, Stack } from "@mui/material";

function Footer() {
    return (
        <Box sx={{ 
            width: '100%', 
            backgroundColor: 'background.paper', 
            pt: 8, 
            pb: 4,
            mt: 'auto',
            borderTop: '1px solid rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)'
        }}>
            <Container maxWidth="lg">
                <Grid container spacing={4}>
                    <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
                        <Typography
                            variant="h6"
                            sx={{
                                fontWeight: 800,
                                textTransform: 'uppercase',
                                letterSpacing: '0.1em',
                                mb: 2,
                                display: 'flex',
                                alignItems: 'center',
                                gap: 1
                            }}
                        >
                            Wear <Box component="span" sx={{ color: 'primary.main' }}>&</Box> Enjoy
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', maxWidth: '300px', mb: 3 }}>
                            Elevating your daily performance through premium design and authentic craftsmanship.
                        </Typography>
                        <Stack direction="row" spacing={1}>
                            <IconButton color="inherit" sx={{ '&:hover': { color: 'primary.main' } }}>
                                <InstagramIcon />
                            </IconButton>
                            <IconButton color="inherit" sx={{ '&:hover': { color: 'primary.main' } }}>
                                <YouTubeIcon />
                            </IconButton>
                            <IconButton color="inherit" sx={{ '&:hover': { color: 'primary.main' } }}>
                                <AudiotrackIcon />
                            </IconButton>
                        </Stack>
                    </Grid>
                    
                    <Grid item xs={6} md={2}>
                        <Typography variant="subtitle2" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, mb: 2, textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>
                            Shop
                        </Typography>
                        <Stack spacing={1}>
                            <Typography component="a" href="/" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', textDecoration: 'none', '&:hover': { color: 'white' } }}>All Products</Typography>
                            <Typography component="a" href="/men" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', textDecoration: 'none', '&:hover': { color: 'white' } }}>Men</Typography>
                            <Typography component="a" href="/women" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', textDecoration: 'none', '&:hover': { color: 'white' } }}>Women</Typography>
                        </Stack>
                    </Grid>

                    <Grid item xs={6} md={2}>
                        <Typography variant="subtitle2" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, mb: 2, textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>
                            Company
                        </Typography>
                        <Stack spacing={1}>
                            <Typography component="a" href="/about-as" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', textDecoration: 'none', '&:hover': { color: 'white' } }}>About Us</Typography>
                            <Typography component="a" href="/about-as" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', textDecoration: 'none', '&:hover': { color: 'white' } }}>Sustainability</Typography>
                            <Typography component="a" href="/about-as" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', textDecoration: 'none', '&:hover': { color: 'white' } }}>Contact</Typography>
                        </Stack>
                    </Grid>

                    <Grid item xs={12} md={4}>
                        <Typography variant="subtitle2" sx={{ fontWeight: 700, mb: 2, textTransform: 'uppercase' }}>
                            Newsletter
                        </Typography>
                        <Typography variant="body2" sx={{ color: 'text.secondary', mb: 2 }}>
                            Join our community for exclusive access to new drops and performance tips.
                        </Typography>
                        {/* Placeholder for newsletter input */}
                        <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', gap: 1 }}>
                            <Box sx={{ 
                                flexGrow: 1, 
                                height: '48px', 
                                border: '1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)', 
                                borderRadius: '12px',
                                display: 'flex',
                                alignItems: 'center',
                                px: 2,
                                color: 'text.muted',
                                fontSize: '0.875rem'
                            }}>
                                email@address.com
                            </Box>
                            <Box sx={{ 
                                height: '48px', 
                                px: 3, 
                                backgroundColor: 'primary.main', 
                                color: 'background.default',
                                borderRadius: '12px',
                                display: 'flex',
                                alignItems: 'center',
                                fontWeight: 700,
                                cursor: 'pointer'
                            }}>
                                Join
                            </Box>
                        </Box>
                    </Grid>
                </Grid>

                <Divider sx={{ my: 6, borderColor: 'rgba(255, 255, 255, 0.06)' }} />

                <Box sx={{ 
                    display: 'flex', 
                    flexDirection: { xs: 'column', md: 'row' },
                    justifyContent: 'space-between',
                    alignItems: 'center',
                    gap: 2
                }}>
                    <Box sx={{ display: 'flex', alignItems: 'center', gap: 0.5, color: 'text.secondary' }}>
                        <CopyrightIcon sx={{ fontSize: '0.875rem' }} />
                        <Typography variant="caption">
                            2026 Wear & Enjoy. All rights reserved.
                        </Typography>
                    </Box>
                    <Typography variant="caption" sx={{ color: 'primary.main', fontWeight: 600 }}>
                        Слава Україні!
                    </Typography>
                </Box>
            </Container>
        </Box>
    )
}

export default Footer;
